headline.description: Headline of the story, actual time and date of the event.

primaryIds.description: Refers to the main company a particular document refers to.

allIds.description: Refers to all companies mentioned in the document. This could also include the primary company id as well.

filingsDate.description: Publish date of the latest version (in ET).

filingsTime.description: Publish time of the latest version (in ET).

categories.description: Categories are country, industry, and subject codes. This is a comma-separated list.

filingsLink.description: The link to download the document.
